info.name: CampusPath AI - AgentCore + FastAPI
info.description:
# CampusPath AI API

This collection covers both runtimes:

1. **AgentCore** ŌĆö `POST {{agentcoreUrl}}/invocations` with a required `route` (or `action`) field
2. **FastAPI UI backend** ŌĆö `POST {{fastapiUrl}}/api/...` endpoints used by the CampusPath frontend

## Allowed routes

- `placement-doubt`
- `career-roadmap`
- `resume-review`
- `interview-prep`

## Shared model controls

Optional on every request. Defaults when omitted:

| Field | Global default | Resume / Interview default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `model_id` | `apac.amazon.nova-pro-v1:0` | `apac.anthropic.claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219-v1:0` |
| `temperature` | `0.4` | `0.4` |
| `top_p` | `0.9` | `0.9` |
| `max_tokens` | `4096` | `4096` |

Every Bedrock call also receives a fresh `<current_datetime>` block (Asia/Kolkata by default).

## Interview prep extras

- `interview_date` (optional, `YYYY-MM-DD`) ŌĆö prep plan is timed to that date
- `resume_text` (optional) ŌĆö questions and frameworks are tailored to the resume

## Response contract

Successful responses include:

- `route` / `route_title` (AgentCore) or `route` (FastAPI)
- `answer`
- `model_params` (values actually used)
- `usage` (`input_tokens`, `output_tokens`, `total_tokens`)
- `cost` (approximate USD estimate)
- `latency_ms`

## Start services

```bash
# AgentCore (port 8080)
source campuspath-venv/bin/activate
cd CampusAgent
agentcore dev --no-browser

# FastAPI UI backend (port 8000)
cd Frontend
uvicorn backend.main:app --reload --port 8000
```

item.name: 1. FastAPI UI backend

request.description: Returns service status, global model defaults, resume-workflow model defaults, and resume-extraction config.

`POST /api/placement-doubt`

Required: `question`
Optional: `student_profile`, model controls
Default model: Nova Pro

body.raw:
{
  "goal": "Cloud / DevOps Engineer",
  "degree": "B.Tech IT",
  "year": "3rd year",
  "skills": "Python, Git, Linux basics, introductory AWS",
  "hours_per_week": 10,
  "model_id": "{{modelId}}",
  "temperature": {{temperature}},
  "top_p": {{topP}},
  "max_tokens": {{maxTokens}}
}

request.description:
`POST /api/career-roadmap`

Required: `goal`, `degree`, `year`
Optional: `skills`, `hours_per_week`, model controls
Default model: Nova Pro

formdata.description: Select a text-based resume PDF (max 5 MB).

request.description:
`POST /api/resume-extract`

Multipart field: `file` (PDF).

Flow: FastAPI ŌåÆ S3 ŌåÆ SAM Lambda (`pypdf`) ŌåÆ delete object.

Response includes:
- `resume_text`
- `suggested_role` (most recent job title when possible)
- `page_count`, `character_count`, `warnings`, `latency_ms`

body.raw:
{
  "target_role": "Machine Learning Engineer",
  "resume_text": "Kushal Bhavsar
Bengaluru | kushal@example.com | linkedin.com/in/kushal

SUMMARY
ML engineer focused on applied NLP and recommendation systems.

WORK EXPERIENCE
Machine Learning Engineer ŌĆö Acme AI Labs (Jan 2024 ŌĆō Present)
- Built a product recommendation pipeline on AWS SageMaker serving 120k weekly users.
- Reduced inference latency by 28% by consolidating feature joins and batching.

Software Developer Intern ŌĆö StartupX (May 2023 ŌĆō Dec 2023)
- Shipped FastAPI microservices and PostgreSQL schemas for an internal analytics tool.

PROJECTS
Campus event platform ŌĆö FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, AWS
- Designed booking APIs and deployed the stack behind an Application Load Balancer.

SKILLS
Python, PyTorch, FastAPI, SQL, AWS, Git

EDUCATION
B.Tech Computer Engineering, graduating 2027",
  "model_id": "{{resumeModelId}}",
  "temperature": {{temperature}},
  "top_p": {{topP}},
  "max_tokens": {{maxTokens}}
}

request.description:
`POST /api/resume-review`

Required: `target_role`, `resume_text` (min 50 chars)
Default model: Claude 3.7 Sonnet

The model is instructed to address the candidate by first name when present and ground feedback in real bullets/projects.

body.raw:
{
  "role": "Machine Learning Engineer",
  "interview_type": "Mixed",
  "experience_level": "Intermediate",
  "interview_date": "2026-08-01",
  "focus_topics": "Python, ML system design, AWS, project deep-dive, behavioral STAR",
  "resume_text": "Kushal Bhavsar
Bengaluru | kushal@example.com

WORK EXPERIENCE

- Reduced inference latency by 28% by consolidating feature joins and batching.

PROJECTS
Campus event platform ŌĆö FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, AWS

SKILLS
Python, PyTorch, FastAPI, SQL, AWS, Git

EDUCATION
B.Tech Computer Engineering, graduating 2027",
  "model_id": "{{resumeModelId}}",
  "temperature": {{temperature}},
  "top_p": {{topP}},
  "max_tokens": {{maxTokens}}
}

request.description:
`POST /api/interview-prep`

Required: `role`
Optional:
- `interview_type` ŌĆö Technical | HR | Mixed
- `experience_level` ŌĆö Beginner | Intermediate | Advanced
- `interview_date` ŌĆö YYYY-MM-DD (prep plan is timed to this date)
- `focus_topics`
- `resume_text` ŌĆö personalizes questions around real experience

Default model: Claude 3.7 Sonnet
Omits `interview_date`, `resume_text`, and model controls. Expect Claude 3.7 Sonnet defaults and a standard 7-day prep plan.

item.description: Endpoints used by the CampusPath frontend (`uvicorn backend.main:app --port 8000`).

item.name: 2. AgentCore runtime

request.description: Checks whether the local AgentCore runtime is running.

Route: `placement-doubt`

Required: `route` (or `action`) + `prompt` OR `question`
Optional: `student_profile`, model controls
Default model: Nova Pro

request.description:
Route: `interview-prep`

Required: `route` + `prompt` OR `role`
Optional: `interview_type`, `experience_level`, `interview_date`, `focus_topics`, `resume_text`, model controls

With `interview_date`, the prep timeline is calculated from today's date through the day before the interview.
Omits model controls so AgentCore applies Nova Pro / 4096 defaults. Response still echoes resolved `model_params`.

item.description: All workflows hit `POST /invocations` and are selected with the body `route` field.

item.name: 3. Validation & payload formats

request.description: Omits `route` / `action`. Expect `ok: false` and a validation error listing allowed routes.
Uses an unsupported route. Expect a validation error.
`action` is accepted as an alias for `route`.
Uses Bedrock-style `messages[]` content blocks with a required `route`.

item.description: Validation failures and alternate AgentCore payload shapes.
